description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.runtime that runs on push and pull requests to the main branch, but only for specific paths. The workflow has two jobs: unit and lint. The unit job runs on ubuntu-20.04, uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions and fluent-syntax versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies, and runs flake8 linting.
